zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas John Lucombe II於大約1339年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓時，他的父親John Lucombe I40歲，母親Anne of Devon41歲。他和Lady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Fleming至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1400年在英國英格蘭戴文斯迪文斯同享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lucombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of the five villages of this name in Devon or from Loscombe in Powerstock, Dorset, all probably named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’ + cumb ‘valley’ (see Coombe ).

variants.name: Coombe
meanings: topographic name from Middle English combe (Old English cumb, of Celtic origin) denoting a bowl-shaped valley, or else a habitational name from a place so named. A large number of places in southwestern England, mostly spelled Combe, are named with this word.
nickname from Middle English come (Old English cuma) ‘guest, stranger, newcomer’. Compare Coombs .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas John Lucombe II was born about 1339, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lucombe I, was 40 and his mother, Anne of Devon, was 41. He had at least 1 son with Lady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Fleming. He died about 1400, in Stevenstone, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas John Lucombe II est né environ 1339, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lucombe I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anne of Devon, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Fleming. Il est décédé environ 1400, à Stevenstone, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas John Lucombe IIが約1339年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンで生まれた時，父John Lucombe Iは40歳，母Anne of Devonは41歳であった。彼はLady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Flemingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1400年にイギリスイギリスデボンステベンストーンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas John Lucombe II(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lucombe I(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne of Devon(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Lady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Fleming(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스티븐스톤에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas John Lucombe II родился около 1339 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lucombe I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne of Devon, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Dorothea Fleming of Stoke Fleming. Он умер около 1400 г. в местности стивенстоун, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
